meta.description: Official distributor of laboratory and medical equipment in Kazakhstan. Analyzers, reagents, microscopes, PCR equipment. Delivery across Kazakhstan.

hero.title: Laboratory Equipment for Kazakhstan Healthcare
hero.subtitle: Supply, installation and service of professional laboratory equipment. Official representative of URIT, HUMAN, Biobase, DNA-Technology and 15+ manufacturers.

categories.title: Equipment Categories
categories.subtitle: Full range of laboratory and medical equipment

why_us.title: Why Choose LabTech
why_us.item1_text: Direct contracts with 19+ manufacturers. Original equipment with conformity certificates and warranty.
why_us.item2_text: Own service center in Almaty. Certified specialist visits throughout Kazakhstan.
why_us.item3_text: Training, instruction and certification for lab and technical staff. On-site training in any city.
why_us.item4_text: 250m² warehouse in Almaty. Delivery across Kazakhstan from 1 business day.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Supplier of laboratory and medical equipment in Kazakhstan. Working with public and private medical institutions since 2008.
about.mission_text: To provide Kazakhstan's laboratories with reliable, certified equipment from the world's leading manufacturers. We deliver not just equipment — we provide the full cycle: from selection and supply to installation, staff training and service.
about.value1_text: Only original equipment with conformity certificates and manufacturer's warranty.
about.value2_text: 15 years on the market, 79% repeat clients — the best proof of trust.
about.value3_text: Team of certified specialists with deep experience in laboratory diagnostics.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: From equipment selection to service maintenance — we support clients at every stage
services.item1_text: Official supply from 19+ world's leading manufacturers. Customs clearance, certification, cargo insurance.
services.item2_text: Professional installation by our certified engineers. Working across Kazakhstan.
services.item3_text: Training, instruction and certification of laboratory and technical personnel. On-site training in any city.
services.item4_text: Scheduled maintenance, repair of any complexity, supply of original consumables and reagents.
services.item5_text: Free consultation on equipment selection. Help with technical specifications for tenders.
services.item6_text: Official warranty on all equipment. Replacement of defective units in the shortest possible time.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.subtitle: Contact us in any convenient way
